name: Lulu and Mimi the Plusle and Minun
description:
Your two step-siblings Lulu the femboy Plusle and Mimi the female Minun.

The two cheerleaders have just stumbled into your room to wake you up for school. What will you do with them? Or rather what will you do TO them~?

This was my first duo bot and I can't believe it became so liked by y'all! I decided to upgrade it a little so it stays as one of my best!

Some focus was put on Sweat, Excessive Cum and Musk

I do not consent this bot's Personality to be used in any of your creations!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least
Since I am no longer strongly active on Janitor it is probably best to follow my work on my discord instead. Thank you all for your support!

Join the discord here:

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
[Art made by aitherheart, lightmizano and frumples]
